RuleSet.Name: src/SchemaObj/IEditObj.java
RuleSet.GenRule: extends I$reference DefSchema SchemaName$$TableName$EditObj$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes alsoIEditObjInheritSuperClass default empty$
, I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable SchemaName$$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$EditObj
, I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$EditObj

/* * create() may return a different instance than the * one used to invoke the operation. All future references * should be to the returned instance, not the original * invoker. You should lose all references to the original * invoker. * * @return The created instance. */ I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$$reference BaseClass TableName$Obj create();
